rebuild_reason: Round-1 gold tests asserted private methods (_initiate_verification_with_cascade, _configured_bureaus, _normalize_auth_method, _providers_for_step), forcing the instruction to publish exact signatures = a checklist. v2 drives the identical fix through public router-facing service entry points and asserts only observable API contract.
excluded_from_fix_commits: loangen-app/** (Next.js frontend — not exercised by the backend verifier)
partial_required_passed: 21/29 (array-only fix; all 8 invite f2p still fail)
env_notes: Image loangenus-repo:v1 bakes in JWT_SECRET_KEY/LIVEKIT_*. default_user_mode='trial' so _is_production_instance() is false and invite_auth never makes the UAT-sync HTTP call. Bureau flags default true in config; the ENV block makes the intent explicit. mongomock_motor==0.0.35 is pip-installed at image build so the verifier can drive persistence-backed public entry points fully offline; a one-line shim lets mongomock accept beanie 2.x's list_collection_names kwargs.
litmus_result: PASS. The instruction is a symptom report at the user/API level. It names only API contract a competent dev could not derive: the isTransition/is_existing_user response fields, the PASSWORD_MISMATCH code, the OTP->KBA->SMFA product order, the nine-digit SSN rule. It names no module path, method signature, return-tuple shape, defect count, or defect shape. A strong dev could not locate the defect files in <2 minutes without running the codebase; the fix requires understanding the cascade across client+service, not grepping a leaked name.
fairness_audit: The Array HTTP client is injected via the ArrayService constructor as an explicit typed fake (no MagicMock); its per-bureau outcome sequence is drawn from one shared iterator by both retrieve_questions (raising) and try_retrieve_questions (non-raising), so it serves either a client-helper or an inline-try/except implementation identically. Persistence runs against a real in-memory Mongo (mongomock_motor) so no Mock leaks into pydantic or beanie. Tests assert only observable response fields and raised ArrayClientErrors — never private method names, return-tuple shapes, or call counts. isTransition is asserted per its stated contract (true only when an attempted method failed before success; an unconfigured skipped bureau is not a transition). The router-forwarding test accepts the confirmation value positionally or by keyword. Two materially different cascade implementations (client-helper vs inline retry) both satisfy all 29 tests.

leak_checks.planted_defect_visible: no — base is a real historical parent commit re-keyed to a single opaque 'import codebase' commit; nothing is artificially planted or diffable

notes: Rebuild of array-credit-report with gold tests moved to public seams. Solution patch spans two real fix commits (10042f3 + 2e4c15f) restricted to six loangen-agent/agent source files; loangen-app frontend excluded. 2e4c15f contributes the skipped-document exclusion in the tracking summary (its own f2p). No sonnet/opus probes run — the chain driver owns probing.
